text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around the academy
with Mejiro Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! The dirt is full of rocks, and it's choked with
weeds! This'll take forever!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
These fields are what's wrong! Prez seemed pretty
upset about them, so I thought I'd help her by
clearing them out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I can help if you'd like? I'm pretty good when it
comes to tilling soil and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Would you really?! I won't say no to that! Thanks
a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we end up helping out in the fields, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Here we gooo! Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whew! Diggin' holes sure gets the blood pumping!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What the?! How'd you get so much further along
than me?!
choice_data_list: Wow, you handle a shovel like a pro!
Wow, you handle a shovel like a pro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I did earn the nickname the "Mejiro
Hole-Digging Champ" when I used to play in the
dirt as a kid.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But with this much ground to cover, it'll probably
take a few days to clear everything out. No
biggie! Let's keep tilling till the end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, we arrive at the fields and are
greeted with a surprise.

text_block_list.name: Palmer Admirers
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Palmer! We're here to help!

text_block_list.name: Palmer Admirer A
text_block_list.text:
With this fieldwork! We heard you needed
backup, so here we are!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Omigosh, are you for real?! Yay! Are you all sure
you can spare the time, though?

text_block_list.name: Palmer Admirer A
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, we made sure to clear our schedules
for today! We were talking yesterday, you see...

text_block_list.name: Palmer Admirer A
text_block_list.text:
And we decided the least we could do was make
the time to help you. After all, you're always
helping us, even when you're busy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're not the only ones who show up to lend a
hand either.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
I brought enough rice balls and drinks for
everyone! There are plenty of side dishes to go
around too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Honeyade! Nothing beats honeyade after
working really hard! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Thanks for bringing us so much stuff! We
really appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is nothing. You're the one who surveyed
everyone for us when we couldn't decide what to
add to the menu, remember?

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Staff
text_block_list.text:
So when I heard you had a big job to do, why, I
knew I had to help out!

text_block_list.name: Cleaning Staff
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Palmer! Need a hand?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we set to work with a small army to help
us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, that'll do! Thanks, everyone! We couldn't
have finished so quickly without your help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, Teio, go ahead and tell Rudolf that the
fields are nice and clear.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I mean, you wanted to boast to her about
how quickly you got the job done, right? And how
much hard work you put in every day to do it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! Man, I just can't win against you...
choice_data_list: Win against me? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! Another submission about Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
"She helped me find something I lost by asking
around as many people as she could and searched
for it with me right up until curfew"...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Students are allowed to send in anything they'd
like into our submission box, but I'm surprised at
how many wrote commendations for one
particular person.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What a blessing it is that we have such a sincere
and earnest guardian angel supporting the
academy from the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
President Rudolf said that about me? Nah, she's
giving me way too much credit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I was surprised when I heard her say that too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it sucks for me to hear that... but I get
where Prez is coming from.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know what's the most impressive thing about
you hearing everyone out and letting them lean
on you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's how you validate and respect everyone's
feelings and worries!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm really grateful for your help, but I'm not gonna
lose to you, Palmer!
choice_data_list: That's right! Keep the praise for Palmer coming!
That's right! Keep the praise for Palmer coming!

Looks like you're on track to become the next
student council president!

Looks like you're on track to become the next
student council president!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm really grateful for your help, but I'm not gonna
lose to you, Palmer!
choice_data_list: That's right! Keep the praise for Palmer coming!
That's right! Keep the praise for Palmer coming!

Looks like you're on track to become the next
student council president!

Looks like you're on track to become the next
student council president!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Not you too, Trainer! Enough with the
compliments!

text_block_list.name: Cleaning Staff
text_block_list.text:
But there are still so many good things left to say
about you! I say we should have a party to
celebrate our hard work and keep praising you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A party would be so lit! But really, enough
with the praise!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't just praise Palmer! I wanna bask in
compliments too! Anyway, let's go! To the
cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Waheeey!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wha?! The next president?! Yeah, right!

text_block_list.name: Palmer Admirer A
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I think you could really pull that off! I'll
plan your whole campaign!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! I can't let that one slide! I'm gonna be the one taking over Prez's seat, got it?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No, they aren't! I'm not trying to fight for that
seat in the first place!
